Common Questions

Frequently Asked
Questions

What is the starting price for a steel door? +

Our doors start from ₹18,800 for Aluminium Glass Doors. Single Steel Doors start from ₹23,500. Mother Son Doors from ₹33,500 and Twin Doors from ₹56,000. All prices include standard installation by our trained technicians.

Do you deliver outside Delhi? +

Yes! We offer PAN India delivery. We have served customers and projects in Mumbai, Pune, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Lucknow, and more. Contact us on WhatsApp for delivery timelines to your city.

Are your doors fire-resistant? +

Yes. All our steel doors are fire-resistant, making them ideal for apartments, housing societies, and commercial buildings. The doors also feature zinc-coated heat-transfer paint for additional protection.

How long does installation take? +

A standard single door installation takes 2–4 hours by our trained technicians. For larger orders or twin/mother-son doors, it may take a full day. We coordinate installation timing directly with you after order confirmation.

Do you offer bulk pricing for builders? +

Absolutely! We offer special pricing for orders of 10 or more doors. We work with builders, housing developers, and contractors across India. Contact us on WhatsApp or fill the distributor form below for a customised project quote.

Can I become a dealer or distributor? +

Yes! We are actively looking for authorised dealers and distributors in cities across India. Dealers get exclusive territory rights, factory-direct pricing, and full marketing support. Fill in the enquiry form below or WhatsApp us to know more.
